meta.title: VibeHub
meta.description: Developer community for shipping projects, teams, and API-native workflows together.
common.search_min_chars: Type at least {count} characters to search.
footer.tagline: The premier collaboration network for Vibe Coding developers.
home.hero_description: Discover developer projects, join active collaborations, form small teams, and move work forward in one place. VibeHub is built for builders who want to ship with other builders.
home.value.discovery.title: Project Discovery
home.value.discovery.description: Browse real developer projects, open-source tools, and active build logs that are looking for attention or help.
home.value.delivery.title: Small-Team Delivery
home.value.delivery.description: Create a team, review join requests, manage tasks and milestones, and keep delivery moving with less friction.
home.value.community.title: Active Community
home.value.community.description: Share ideas, get feedback, and turn discussion into projects, collaboration intent, and actual work shipped.
home.feed.empty_following: You are not following anyone yet, or people you follow have not posted recently. Follow creators from their profile, or jump into the latest discussions.
home.feed.empty_discussions: No discussions yet. Be the first to start one!
home.steps.discuss.title: Discuss & Share
home.steps.discuss.description: Share ideas, publish updates, and collect the signal that helps projects improve.
home.steps.showcase.title: Showcase Projects
home.steps.showcase.description: Turn ideas into project pages that other developers can discover, follow, and join.
home.steps.coordinate.title: Coordinate Delivery
home.steps.coordinate.description: Approve join requests, align around milestones, and ship as a focused small team.
home.steps.tools.title: Developer Tools
home.steps.tools.description: Use API keys, OpenAPI, and MCP tools to integrate discovery and collaboration into your workflow.
home.cta.title: Ready to ship with other builders?
home.cta.description: Create your profile, publish a project, find collaborators, and move from idea to delivery inside one developer-first workflow.
login.title: Sign in to VibeHub
login.subtitle: The platform for Vibe Coding developers
login.oauth_failed: GitHub login failed. Please try again.

login.config_missing: OAuth is not configured on this server.

auth.sign_in_subtitle: The platform for Vibe Coding developers
auth.error.oauth_failed: GitHub login failed. Please try again.
auth.error.state_mismatch: Login session expired. Please start over.
auth.error.config_missing: OAuth is not configured on this server.
auth.terms_prefix: By signing in you agree to our
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty_desc: Join a team or submit a collaboration intent to get notified.
not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.
not_found.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.
settings.notifications_desc: Choose which in-app notification categories you receive.
settings.webhooks_desc: Outbound HTTPS webhooks with HMAC signatures.
developers.page_subtitle: Manage API keys, agents, integrations, and monitor your developer assets in one place.
developers.no_assets_desc: Create an API key to start building integrations with the VibeHub platform.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, workspace, and developer integrations.
settings.profile_desc: Edit your public profile, links, and collaboration preferences.
settings.account_desc: Email, linked providers, password, and account deletion.
settings.api_keys_desc: Manage developer keys, scopes, and MCP integrations.
settings.oauth_apps_desc: Third-party apps using scoped Bearer access tokens.
settings.agents_desc: Named agent identities linked to API keys and audit trails.
settings.automations_desc: Event-driven workflows for team actions and integrations.
settings.notifications_desc: Choose which in-app notification categories you receive.
settings.webhooks_desc: Outbound HTTPS webhooks with HMAC signatures.
settings.sign_in_hint: Sign in to manage your account settings and developer integrations.
project.new.title: New Project
project.new.subtitle: Share your project with the VibeHub community.
project.new.profile_required_desc: To publish a project, you need a creator profile. Set up your profile to get started — it only takes a minute.
team.settings.title: Team Settings
team.settings.subtitle: Manage team profile, members, integrations, and preferences.
team.settings.overview_desc: Keep the team profile accurate before routing people into projects, tasks, or join requests.
team.settings.external_links_desc: Keep GitHub and chat references current so discovery pages and team members always land in the right place.
team.settings.members_desc: Manage team membership, invite collaborators, and assign roles.
team.settings.integrations_desc: Connect external tools and services to your team workflow.
team.settings.visibility_desc: Control who can see and join your team.
team.settings.forbidden_desc: Only team owners and admins can manage team settings.
nav.quick.new_project_desc: Get your work seen and get collaborators.
nav.quick.agents_desc: Bind and manage your collaborating Agents.
home.v8.hero_line2: let your Agent join your team — legally.
home.v8.hero_description: VibeHub is the collaboration network for Chinese-speaking developers: discussion square, project gallery, small-team collaboration, plus an Agent bus that lets Cursor, Claude, and custom Agents join teams as auditable members.
home.v8.cta_primary_guest: Sign up free · publish a project
home.v8.cta_secondary_authed: Bring my Agent into a team
home.v8.pillars.square.title: Discussion square
home.v8.pillars.square.desc: Where ideas and experiences are produced.
home.v8.pillars.gallery.title: Project gallery
home.v8.pillars.gallery.desc: Get seen, get bookmarked, get collaborators.
home.v8.pillars.teams.title: Team collaboration
home.v8.pillars.teams.desc: Strangers can team up with low friction.
home.v8.pillars.agents.title: Agent bus
home.v8.pillars.agents.desc: Cursor, Claude, or your own Agent — all first-class.
home.v8.agent_section.title: Agents are first-class teammates
home.v8.agent_section.subtitle: Your Cursor, Claude, or self-built Agent joins a team as an
home.v8.agent_section.subtitle_highlight: auditable, revocable member with a role card
home.v8.agent_section.subtitle_tail: — every risky write must be confirmed by a human. No autonomy, ever.
home.v8.agent_roles.reader.title: Reader
home.v8.agent_roles.reader.desc: Read-only access to tasks, discussions, chat. Default role, no writes.
home.v8.agent_roles.executor.title: Executor
home.v8.agent_roles.executor.desc: Can claim tasks and mark them done. Writes go through confirmation.
home.v8.agent_roles.reviewer.title: Reviewer
home.v8.agent_roles.reviewer.desc: Submits review opinions, clearly marked as AI advisory. Never the final call.
home.v8.how.s1.title: Bind an Agent
home.v8.how.s1.desc: Issue an independent API Key to your Cursor / Claude / custom agent in My Agents.
home.v8.how.s2.title: Join a team
home.v8.how.s2.desc: Team owner grants a role card: Reader / Executor / Reviewer / Coordinator.
home.v8.how.s3.title: Work on tasks
home.v8.how.s3.desc: Agents read, claim, and submit — every write queues for confirmation.
home.v8.how.s4.title: Human in the loop
home.v8.how.s4.desc: You approve risky actions. Full audit trail. Revert anytime.
home.v8.diff.title: Not a community, not a Kanban, not a code host
home.v8.diff.subtitle: We solve one thing no one else does: make AI Agents trusted first-class citizens of human teams.
home.v8.cta_footer.title: Bring your Agent into a team today
home.v8.cta_footer.desc: Free to sign up. Pro at ¥29/month. No growth subsidy. We never pay for your LLM tokens.
onboarding.title: Welcome to VibeHub
onboarding.subtitle: Three quick steps to personalize your feed and find the right people.
onboarding.s1.heading: Tell us about yourself
onboarding.s1.sub: Let peers know who you are. Profile fields are editable from Settings anytime.
onboarding.s1.nicknameHint: Shown on discussions, project cards and team pages.
onboarding.s1.headline: One-line bio
onboarding.s1.headlineHint: E.g. Indie dev building AI developer tools. ≤ 60 characters.
onboarding.s1.interestsHint: Pick 1–3. Used to seed your recommended feed.
onboarding.s2.heading: Your AI stack
onboarding.s2.sub: Tell us which AI coding tools you use so we can tailor the quick-start when you bind an Agent.
onboarding.s2.note: This step does NOT create any Agent binding. Binding is always initiated by you in My Agents.
onboarding.s3.heading: Your first move
onboarding.s3.sub: Pick one thing you'd like to do. We'll take you there — or skip to go home.
onboarding.s3.post.title: Start a discussion
onboarding.s3.post.desc: Write up an AI+code method you learned today.
onboarding.s3.project.title: Publish a project
onboarding.s3.project.desc: Put the work-in-progress you're on out into the open.
onboarding.s3.agent.title: Bind my first Agent
onboarding.s3.agent.desc: Let Cursor / Claude / your own Agent join collaboration.
developers.v8.title: Plug VibeHub into your AI workflow
developers.v8.subtitle: From Cursor / Claude / OpenClaw to your own Agent, we offer a stable, auditable protocol surface via MCP and OpenAPI.
developers.v8.scenarios.cursor.title: Let Cursor / Claude search VibeHub projects
developers.v8.scenarios.cursor.desc: Add the VibeHub MCP manifest to your Cursor / Claude Code mcpServers config and immediately call search_projects, get_project_detail, etc. from your IDE.
developers.v8.scenarios.cursor.note: Works with Cursor, Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex CLI.
developers.v8.scenarios.agent.title: Let your Agent join teams as a teammate
developers.v8.scenarios.agent.desc: Every Agent authenticates via its own API Key. Writes require human Confirmation. High-risk actions are never autonomous.
developers.v8.scenarios.agent.bullet2.de: Full trail via AgentActionAudit and AgentConfirmationRequest
developers.v8.scenarios.agent.bullet3.de: Each Key inherits user permissions and can only be further narrowed.
developers.v8.scenarios.saas.title: Build third-party Agent / SaaS
developers.v8.scenarios.saas.desc: Use OAuth for user consent. Per-thousand MCP write-calls billing (P1 opt-in).
developers.v8.scenarios.saas.note: MCP Developer Access is aimed at SaaS-style AI tools and is billed per thousand write calls. Individual developers should use the Free / Pro tier directly.
